2026-0666
2026-06-22GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityAgreement under the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea on the Conservation and Sustainable Use of Marine Biological Diversity of Areas beyond National JurisdictionOrder authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement under the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea on the Conservation and Sustainable Use of Marine Biological Diversity of Areas beyond National Jurisdiction, done at New York on June 19, 2023.N/A
subject: Agreement under the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea on the Conservation and Sustainable Use of Marine Biological Diversity of Areas beyond National Jurisdiction
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement under the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea on the Conservation and Sustainable Use of Marine Biological Diversity of Areas beyond National Jurisdiction, done at New York on June 19, 2023.
